name: The Unblinking Stone
descriptionSeed: Unadorned stone, no ornament, no comfort, and no lies. The Verists say what is so, whatever it costs, and it costs. They are not cruel — many of them are gentle — but they will tell you the thing nobody has ever told you, on the day you meet, and they will not apologize, and years later you may be grateful.
encounterFlavor: Verists who tell you the exact truth about yourself within an hour; a visitor reeling from it; a Verist who is dying of the truth they told and does not regret it.
questSeeds: A truth has been told that has ruined an innocent and the teller was correct to tell it
The Verists have learned something about the Valley and are coming to say it out loud
